page: Microsoft Azure M128bds_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 64 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8473C processor operating at 4.0 GHz. The system is equipped with 1024 GB of RAM, providing a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per core. It includes a 410 GB local disk and supports Premium Storage for high-performance block storage needs.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier capabilities across memory and database operations. The server achieved a Passmark CPU score of 106,632.43 and a multi-core stress-ng CPU performance score of 110,265.07. Memory bandwidth is exceptionally high, reaching 9,007.9 GB/sec for cached small-block reads and 433.69 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads. Database workloads perform strongly, with Redis SET operations reaching 138.18 million operations per second and Passmark database operations scoring 34,375.01. Single-core performance is moderate, with a stress-ng single-core score of 2,056.28.

This hardware profile is highly cost-efficient for large-scale enterprise databases, in-memory analytics, and memory-intensive web serving. The inclusion of Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) and AVX-512 instruction sets enables efficient execution of large language model inference, achieving 38.5 tokens per second for prompt processing on a 70B model. However, the lack of dedicated GPU hardware makes it less suitable for heavy GPU-accelerated deep learning training, relying instead on its high-capacity CPU and memory architecture for compute tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure M128bds_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine powered by an Intel Xeon 8473C processor with 128 dedicated vCPUs, 64 physical cores, and a 4.0 GHz clock speed. It features 1024 GB of RAM, a 410 GB local disk, and supports Premium Storage. Benchmarks show top-tier performance in memory bandwidth, reaching 433.69 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads, and database operations, with Redis SET throughput at 138.18 million operations per second. The processor includes advanced instruction sets like Intel AMX and AVX-512, which support strong multi-threaded decompression and large language model inference. This server is highly suited for memory-intensive enterprise databases, in-memory data processing, and large-scale web serving workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M128bds_v3 is a memory-optimized server featuring 128 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1024 GB of RAM, and a 410 GB local disk, delivering top-tier database and memory bandwidth performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M128bds_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine with 128 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and high-speed database performance.
tagline: A high-capacity, memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and exceptional memory bandwidth for demanding enterprise database workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8473C processor with 128 dedicated vCPUs and 4.0 GHz clock speed
1024 GB of RAM providing high memory density for in-memory applications
Includes 410 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier memory bandwidth and database operation performance
Intel AMX and AVX-512 support for accelerated vector and matrix operations
Best suited for large-scale databases, in-memory analytics, and web serving
